state_snapshot.overall_goal: Stabilize, encapsulate, and verify the Alice Viewer 2 rendering pipeline via remote CI/CD marathon and local toolchain alignment.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **Single-Header Encapsulation**: CAD pipeline logic extracted to `include/CADPipelineTest.h`. - **Cross-Platform Purity**: Eliminated MSVC-specific functions; verified green status on Ubuntu and Windows remote runners. - **Mandated Toolchain**: LLVM/Ninja environment successfully regenerated with explicit manifest tool alignment.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **CI/CD Triggers**: Pull Requests are required to trigger the Cross-Platform Build workflow for non-main branches. - **Portability Traps**: `size_t` requires ``; `strcasecmp` replaces `_stricmp` on Linux; `fopen`/`sprintf` preferred over `_s` variants for cross-platform stability. - **Manifest Tooling**: `llvm-mt.exe` serves as a drop-in replacement for `mt.exe` in isolated LLVM environments.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/CADPipelineTest.h`: Encapsulated mesh loading, AABB logic, and rendering switchboard. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Refactored to minimal mandated pattern. - `docs/PIPELINE_ARCHITECTURE.md`: Technical summary of depth precision, shading, and vectorization. - `build/`: Regenerated and stable local build environment.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Hygiene & Sanitization: Core files Allman-styled and STL-purged. 2. [DONE] Logic Extraction: CAD Pipeline encapsulated. 3. [DONE] Remote CI/CD Marathon: Green status on Ubuntu and Windows. 4. [DONE] VS Code Handoff: Build environment regenerated and verified. 5. [DONE] State Compression: Task complete.
